title: The Green Half
description: Four ingredients have the G− aspect. All four G− alchemicals are accounted for — what sign must the remaining ingredients have?

hints.text: Your clues tell you ing1, ing2, ing3, and ing4 are all G-. How many G- alchemicals exist in the game in total?
There are exactly 4 G- alchemicals: pnP, pNn, Nnp, NNN. All four are already committed to ing1, ing2, ing3, and ing4. No G- alchemical is left for ing6. What sign must ing6 have?
The four G- alchemicals (pnP, pNn, Nnp, NNN) are fully used by ing1, ing2, ing3, and ing4. The remaining four alchemicals — npN, nPp, Ppn, PPP — are all G+. So ing6 must be G+.
